title: I require a time tracking widget capable of monitoring multiple columns
excerpt:
I am using the Timetracking function to track the times of builds in my product line. This is working pritty well and we are collecting good date.

posts.author: Jaresco (Josh Aresco)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am using the Timetracking function to track the times of builds in my product line. This is working pritty well and we are collecting good date.

image1378×603 64.9 KB

Now the problems start with the Time Tracking widget. You see, I like that you can track when the times change. I like that it will sum who did what times and total them. For my workflow needs, I need to track all the unit lanes at one time. A tech will finish many units in a week, and I need that total broken down like this.

image1842×837 41 KB

I think i can get what i need done if i could only add more columns here.

image361×512 14.5 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Josh,

Thanks for raising this with us!

At this time, it is only possible to select one time-tracking column in the widget - I apologise for the setback. I will happily add this to the feedback we’ve received, internally

We do recommend exploring our apps marketplace for time-tracking specific use-cases, as we have a number of apps available that can help you achieve your end goal.

Screen Shot 2024-03-11 at 12.44.50 pm2242×1124 353 KB

posts.author: Jaresco (Josh Aresco)
posts.cookedHtml: I have tried many of these, and most seem to do the same thing, just skinned a little differently. Might there be an app you or anyone can point me to, to take the data I have and present it more fully?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Josh,

I hear you!

Transparently, I haven’t tested and tried them all in enough depth to recommend a specific one for this usecase, however, I can say that Tracket is currently our top-rated app for time-tracking, if this is one that you haven’t yet explored yet.

It also appears that 7pace Timetracker is one that’s been highly rated and utilised by a number of users!
